metadata.description: Native-first, low-friction companion plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: task-queue
plugins.description: Turns Claude Code's native task list into a live work queue: a review loop on every prompt, cross-session resume, one-command ship (verify → PR → squash-merge), and an enforced autopilot that defers what needs the owner as a reviewable pile — ❓ decisions vs ⏳ owner-action items — while deciding the routine rest. Full details on the plugin page.

plugins.name: tidy
plugins.description: Clean-as-you-touch: formats and lint-checks the file you just edited, surfaces its blast radius, and holds a Stop-hook verification floor (runs your existing tests, the project's own quality gates, and prune nudges) — the safety net a non-technical owner can't produce. On-demand /tidy:audit queues a whole-project cleanup. Tests are opt-in, never forced. Full details on the plugin page.

plugins.name: charter
plugins.description: Know the project: a SessionStart brief flagging missing Claude-facing docs and git-derived "scar tissue" (repeatedly-fixed files), a Stop-time gate that checks finished work against recorded decisions, and /charter:align on demand. Full details on the plugin page.

plugins.name: hud
plugins.description: One read-only status line for the companion plugins — health, an always-on 🛡 safety shield (🛡✗N when a floor is off), tests, the 🎨 design / 🔒 review edit-gates, feature state, parked ❓ decisions + ⏳ owner-blocked items, token throughput, and git branch — in three glanceable zones. Zero model-token cost. Full details on the plugin page.
